meaning: adj.(4世纪时居住在荷兰法兰克部落的)撒利族的
examples: Here is a text from the Salic law.
Their source rocks are salic crust and the granites belong to S-type granites.
Zanamivir was synthesized with salic acid as starting material by enzymatic catalysis method.
Japan's "salic" law is in fact not all that ancient.
